bins.description: Single-packet message completes and publishes a descriptor
Payload-only SRAM pack observed (byte i at base+i)
Every PD_* packet-drop reason (error_cases of FM_DECODE_VDM/FM_DECODE_MCTP) observed with no side effect
Every AD_* assembly-drop reason (error_cases of FM_ALLOC_CONTEXT/FM_APPEND) observed aborting exactly its context
descriptor after final SRAM flush observed

coverage_goals.functional: Legacy alias: function + cycle coverage must both close.
coverage_goals.line: >= 90% instrumented line coverage or explicit waiver
coverage_goals.branch: >= 85% instrumented branch coverage or explicit waiver
coverage_goals.fsm: 100% declared FSM states and legal transitions covered
coverage_goals.scenario: All SSOT scenarios pass with executable cocotb/pyuvm checkers and FL-vs-RTL scoreboard evidence

waived_limitations.line: SSOT requests line/code coverage, but this simulator run did not produce LCOV DA records; functional/cycle closure is judged from RTL-observed scoreboard coverage.
waived_limitations.branch: SSOT requests branch coverage, but this simulator run did not produce LCOV BRDA/BRF records; functional/cycle closure is judged from RTL-observed scoreboard coverage.
